label: qwen36_35b_a3b_gguf_q4km_q4ks_router256_4k128
git_commit_under_test: working-tree pre-commit: qwen35 GGUF c=1 router split-shared coop threads=256

hardware.note: local RX 7900 XTX/gfx1100 repeated-run diagnostic; W7900 not rerun

change.summary: Pass threads=256 to qwen35_router_topk_split_shared_coop_out_bf16 in the c=1 GGUF decode MoE path instead of using the wrapper default 512-thread launch.
change.rationale: The cooperative split-shared router processes hidden=2048 and 128 experts for a single decode row. The 512-thread default over-parallelizes this small c=1 launch; 256 threads preserves correctness and reduces router small-kernel overhead.

correctness_and_dispatch_gate.coverage_note: Updated fake runtime routing test asserts the c=1 split-shared cooperative router is called with threads=256. Router plan tests cover accepted wrapper thread values; benchmark sanity checks finite final logits and stable final token IDs.

benchmark_command_common: HIPENGINE_GGUF_AOTRITON_PREFILL=v3 HIPENGINE_GGUF_ALLOW_UNSAFE_QWEN35MOE_FASTPATHS=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. uv run python scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model <model> --quant <gguf_q4_k_m|gguf_q4_k_s> --prompt-length 4096 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 3 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json <tmp-json>

comparison.note: PARO comparison is the prior local 2026-05-21 row, not rerun in this artifact.

decision: Retain router threads=256 for GGUF c=1 decode. It improves both required GGUF columns at 4K/128: Q4_K_M +2.76% decode and Q4_K_S +2.72% decode, with unchanged tracked peak memory and finite deterministic final logits.
